title: Dual Survival
desc: Trapped in the canyons of Croatia's Velebit Mountain, Grady and Josh try to navigate the frigid, fast-moving rapids and treacherous waterfalls.

title: Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
desc: Ed Stafford travels the globe to attempt the world's toughest coming-of-age rituals.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear paraglides into the Rockies, traverses huge waterfalls and navigates deep gullies before leaping onto a moving train.

title: Man Eats Wild
desc: Mario Kalpou's passion for harvesting wild food through hunting and fishing leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet.

title: Dual Survival Brazil
desc: Professional survivalists put their skills to the test and attempt to conquer the dangerous wilderness of South America.

title: Dual Survival Mexico
desc: In the jungles of Choco, the survivalists must navigate mangroves and dangerous estuaries infested with alligators to make it out alive.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls travels around Southern China after a typhoon and conquers swollen rivers. He also gets bitten by cruel ants.

title: Marooned With Ed Stafford
desc: Stranded alone in the wilds of Rwanda, Ed Stafford attempts to survive alone for 10 days without food, water or even a knife.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear is marooned on a desert island south of Papua New Guinea. He wades across a shark-infested tidal channel and constructs a bamboo windsurfer to make his escape.

title: Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
desc: Ed participates in the annual rite of passage festival Naadam to wrestle an enormous heir of Genghis Khan in order to prove his masculinity.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: Two international survivalists from Mexico and Norway fight to reach 21 days amid torrential rain and little food in the American wilderness.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: A hairdresser and a former correctional officer try to survive 14 days in Zambia, where a herd of aggressive elephants stalks them.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: A hairdresser and a former correctional officer try to survive 14 days in Zambia, where a herd of aggressive elephants stalks them.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: Four male survivalists who tapped in previous challenges seek redemption in South Africa. Humbled by their past failures, they bravely face their days ahead.

title: Naked and Afraid Apocalypse
desc: Wes and Stee brave croccodile filled waters to build a fish dam and get their first catch of the challenge. Meanwhile, a heat wave has both Joe and Frank on the brink.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: From Mexico's Yucatán to Botswana's Okavango Delta, beloved duo Ernie and Mandy are back for 21 days, equipped with enhanced abilities and new tools.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear paraglides into the Rockies, traverses huge waterfalls and navigates deep gullies before leaping onto a moving train.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls is dropped on an ice cap covering an active volcano. Struggling to make headway in the blizzard, the barren landscape offers him little food.

title: Gold Rush
desc: The Lewis crew begins sluicing and weighs their first gold while Freddy and Juan enhance a large trommel. Meanwhile, Dakota Fred's return and Christo's visit coincide with crew divisions at Dustin's site.

title: 18 Wheels Across India
desc: David Andres races to acquire his cargo from Delhi to Bengaluru, and uncovers the vibrant soul of India as he travels through each state.

title: Dual Survival Mexico
desc: In the jungles of Choco, the survivalists must navigate mangroves and dangerous estuaries infested with alligators to make it out alive.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Actor Jake Gyllenhaal assists Bear in showcasing survival techniques in Iceland.

title: Man, Woman, Wild
desc: Mykel's and Ruth's rented boat breaks down in the middle of the sea. However, their attempts at survival gets more challenging as they fight dehydration and sickness.

title: Facing The Unknown
desc: An adventurer embarks on admission, traversing diverse unknown regions, exploring the place with minimal support and gears.

title: WildFed
desc: From mountains to forests to waters, the host visits different places in search of wild ingredients and transforms them into gourmet meals for friends and family.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls is dropped on an ice cap covering an active volcano. Struggling to make headway in the blizzard, the barren landscape offers him little food.

title: Dual Survival Mexico
desc: Fernanda and Palma start their mission trapped in the dark caverns in Chicamocha Canyon. They face snake-infested ravines and dangerous waterfalls.

title: Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
desc: Ed travels to Tanzania to meet the Hadzabe people, who live in harmony with their environment. He joins them as they face the challenge of collecting honey from aggressive bees.

title: Man Eats Wild
desc: Mario returns to his Australian homeland to assist a friend with wild boar pest control and to catch some prehistoric fish.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls travels around Southern China after a typhoon and conquers swollen rivers. He also gets bitten by cruel ants.

title: 18 Wheels Across India
desc: A popular Polish lorry driver undertakes the daunting task of navigating India's notorious and chaotic road networks, all while exploring the culture.

title: Dual Survival Mexico
desc: Abandoned in the middle of the province of Vichada, Fernanda and Palma must combine their skills and ingenuity to cross a savannah.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls navigates lava flows and scrambles through caves in an active volcano. Additionally, he must stop a viper from nesting beside him while he sleeps.

title: Marooned With Ed Stafford
desc: Ed is stranded in the Sonoran Desert with no food, water or even a knife. In this situation, he attempts to survive on his own for 10 days.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear skydives into Australia's Northern Territory. He will rely on the survival skills honed by the aboriginal people to survive in this sweltering landscape.

title: Man, Woman, Wild
desc: Mykel Hawke, a survival expert, and his wife Ruth, a journalist, navigate some of the world's most forbidding and remote locations with limited resources.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: Two superfans take on Mexico's Yucatan jungle for 14 days. However, they have to rely on sheer grit to battle brutal storms, vampire bats and unrelenting hunger.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: Two superfans battle oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks in Guyana's scorching savannah. Severe dehydration forces a desperate fan to drink unsanitary fluids.

title: Naked and Afraid
desc: Three women attempt to survive 21 days in Zambia. But, when their fourth partner arrives unexpectedly, the all-female dynamic is shattered.
